headline: Bootcamp Apps
introText: Here you will find an overview of the full-stack applications developed during the intensive program and deployed on a dedicated vServer infrastructure.

darkbay.title: DarkBay – Digital Auction House
darkbay.description:
A fully functional full-stack auction platform for pirates. Developed as a high-performance Single Page Application with an Angular frontend and a robust NestJS backend within a monorepo. The application features secure JWT authentication, real-time validation, and a relational MariaDB database connection via TypeORM.

Go to Live App

cyber-chat.title: Cyber-Chat API
cyber-chat.description:
A modern backend project demonstrating a secure REST API architecture built with NestJS. The application implements complete user management, including encrypted authentication and role-based security. The entire infrastructure is documented and tested using an interactive OpenAPI/Swagger interface.

Go to API Documentation (Swagger)
